stemHtml: An aeroplane is flying in the transonic speed range in straight and level flight. If the Mach number decreases, what additional input or action will be required to maintain straight and level flight to compensate for the centre of pressure’s movement, whilst exiting the transonic region?

options.a: A pitch up input to the elevator or the stabiliser.
options.c: A pitch down input to the elevator or the stabiliser.
options.d: A lower IAS to compensate the nose up effect.
